chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1260 of 2018 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.1307/2024 (6 Rule 17 CPC) 3. For hearing of CMA No.6586/2018 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 03.09.2025 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General ************** Counsel for the petitioner does not press the present Constitution Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with all the pending applications. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
